description_long: This is a thick, ornate book with a dark reddish-brown cover, reinforced at the corners and spine with black protective patches. The cover features a prominent circular medallion in the center, decorated with intricate gold and turquoise patterns reminiscent of Middle Eastern or Islamic art. The book's pages are visibly aged, with a yellowed, textured appearance and a few colored fabric bookmarks protruding from the sides. The edges of the cover are slightly irregular, giving it a hand-crafted, ancient look. The overall design suggests a valuable or sacred text, possibly a religious or historical manuscript, with a sturdy build for frequent handling.
description: A thick, reddish-brown book with ornate gold and turquoise cover art, black corner protectors, and visible aged pages. Decorative and sturdy, it resembles a valuable or sacred manuscript.
description_view_0: The book is seen from the side, showing the textured, yellowed pages and a gold fabric bookmark protruding. The circular medallion and black corner protectors are visible on the cover.
description_view_1: The book is viewed from the front, displaying the cover's central medallion, two black corner protectors, and the layered, aged pages with a gold and a red bookmark visible.
description_view_2: The opposite side of the book reveals more aged pages and a blue fabric bookmark. The ornate medallion and black corner protectors are also visible.
description_view_3: The back of the book is shown, with the reddish-brown cover and two black corner protectors. The medallion is still visible, but no bookmarks or page edges are seen.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover features a large, circular medallion with intricate gold and turquoise patterns, evoking a sense of traditional Middle Eastern or Islamic art. The design is ornate and symmetrical, serving as the main decorative element on the otherwise solid-colored cover.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is covered in reddish-brown material with black protective patches at the top and bottom. No text or decorative patterns are visible.
